dataset_context.row_meaning: Each row is one employee or consultant with current role, education details, and prior employment history.
interpretation_rules: Treat company1/company2/company3 and matching JobTitle fields as ordered prior work history.
Treat Pay as compensation-like text in LPA format and normalize it before analytics.
Do not assume EmpCode is globally unique.
retrieval_bias: Support filters on designation, employment type, education, joining date, and prior employers.
Support similarity retrieval based on role background, education, and previous companies.

notes.scope: HR dataset context only; excludes generic vector DB guidance not specific to the source file.
